---
name: Skill request
about: Suggest a new German-first skill
title: "[Skill]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

Which real German user problem should this skill solve?

## Target user

Who would use it?

## Desired work product

What should the AI produce?

Examples:

- Prüfvermerk
- Vertragsklausel
- Synopse
- Risikoampel
- Mandanten-E-Mail
- Maßnahmenplan

## Legal or professional area

Where should this be filed?

## What top work should do differently

What separates a normal answer from an excellent one here?
